key_risks: Geopolitical escalation in the Middle East disrupting semiconductor supply chains
Sticky inflation readings on May 12 CPI release prompting delayed rate cuts
Potential rotation out of momentum stocks if Q1 earnings disappoint
rationale_summary: Semiconductors show the strongest recent 30-day momentum at 29.68% amid sustained AI-driven demand and earnings growth estimates of 27.7% for Q1. Weakening labor data and geopolitical tensions favor high-growth tech themes over cyclicals or defensives in the one-month window.
